mountain.name: Mountain Harbor
mountain.headline: You've found a quiet place.
mountain.subcopy: In a noisy world. A harbor for your mind. A space to return to yourself.

cyber.name: Cyber Harbor
cyber.kicker: Human Harbor for the Agent Era
cyber.headline: When machines become faster, humans need somewhere slower.
cyber.subcopy: A living gateway for attention, state, and direction in the Agent Era.

garden.name: Garden Harbor
garden.headline: Some answers wait in a quieter garden.
garden.subcopy: A soft space for recovery, creation, and slow attention.

ocean.name: Ocean Harbor
ocean.headline: The world is changing. You do not have to drift alone.
ocean.subcopy: Find a harbor before you sail into the unknown.

recovery.name: Recovery Harbor
recovery.headline: Choose the state you want to move through.
recovery.subcopy: A gentle place to pause, breathe, listen, and return.

manifesto.name: Manifesto Harbor
manifesto.headline: Where should human attention go when machines can do almost everything else?
manifesto.subcopy: Read the Human Harbor Manifesto and join the first circle of observers.
